antipattern.symptom: Settings configured manually in UI; no script, no audit trail.
antipattern.root-cause: Bootstrap script not written; one-time setup got skipped.
antipattern.fix: Write bootstrap.sh and commit it; re-run to verify drift.

antipattern.symptom: Secrets pushed via `env:` in workflow YAML.
antipattern.root-cause: Author copied a tutorial that used env for secrets.
antipattern.fix: Migrate to `gh secret set`; reference via `${{ secrets.X }}`; rotate the leaked value.

antipattern.symptom: Re-running bootstrap fails (e.g. repo exists, secret already set).
antipattern.root-cause: Author didn't guard create steps with exists-checks.
antipattern.fix: Wrap each gh command with `gh repo view || gh repo create ...` style guards.
